title: 10 best herbal teas for altitude sickness
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, teas helps with altitude sickness because it contains compounds that aid in reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. The calming properties of English lavender tea help to alleviate the anxiety and discomfort often associated with high altitudes.
